documentation.name: README.md
documentation.summary: Project overview: research question, sub-questions, directory structure, planned methodology, data sources, scope, early-scaffold status.

documentation.name: proposal.md
documentation.summary: Thesis proposal draft: research question, sub-questions, background/motivation (the friend's saints question and 2 Maccabees), related work, data sources, methodology, expected contribution, timeline, scope guardrails.

documentation.name: historical_notes.md
documentation.summary: Personal research-journal: entry template plus one real entry on the saints/2 Maccabees question, with an IEEE-style reference list.

documentation.name: canon_lists.md
documentation.summary: Draft reference listing books in the Protestant (66), Catholic (73), and Orthodox (76-81) canons, plus key historical decision points to research.

config:requirements.txt.name: requirements.txt

file:src/data_loader.py.name: data_loader.py
file:src/data_loader.py.summary: Utilities for loading canon book lists and raw scriptural texts; load_canon_list is unimplemented (raises NotImplementedError), load_raw_text reads from data/raw/ which is empty.

file:src/align_corpus.py.name: align_corpus.py
file:src/align_corpus.py.summary: Working set-comparison logic: align_books builds a presence matrix across traditions, unique_to_tradition filters it. Not yet wired to real data.

file:src/graph_builder.py.name: graph_builder.py
file:src/graph_builder.py.summary: Working NetworkX graph builders for canon overlap and translation lineage; lineage graph currently uses hardcoded placeholder edges.
